text: The robotic instruments are used to dissect the hernia sac after gaining access to the intra-abdominal cavity during a ventral hernia repair procedure.
The surgeon uses robotic instruments to close the hernia defect after it has been exposed and sized, demonstrating precise manipulation within the intra-abdominal cavity.

The surgeon places an adequately sized mesh into the intra-abdominal cavity, securing it to the abdominal wall with a center stitch. Transfascial sutures and circumferential tacks are then used to further secure the mesh in place.
